title: State Street Announces Organizational Changes
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) announced today that Louis D. Maiuri, president, chief operating officer and head of Investment Services, will retire from State Street by early 2024. Effective January 1, 2024, Ron O'Hanley, chairman and chief executive officer will assume the office of the president (in addition to his current roles as chairman and chief executive officer) and responsibility for Investment Services, State Street's largest business. Mostapha Tahiri,.

title: State Street Corporation (STT) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT ) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript October 18, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Ilene Fiszel Bieler - Global Head of Investor Relations Ronald P. O'Hanley - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Eric Aboaf - Vice Chairman and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Alexander Blostein - Goldman Sachs Kenneth Usdin - Jefferies Brennan Hawken - UBS Glenn Schorr - Evercore Ryan Kenny - Morgan Stanley Brian Bedell - Deutsche Bank Ebrahim Poonawala - Bank of America Steven Chubak - Wolfe Research Michael Brown - KBW Michael Mayo - Wells Fargo Securities Gerard Cassidy - RBC Capital Markets Operator Good morning and welcome to State Street Corporation's Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast.

title: State Street shares rise on 3Q earnings beat
text: State Street Corporation (NYSE:STT) shares gained nearly 2% Wednesday afternoon after the company's third-quarter earnings beat Street expectations.  The financial services firm posted adjusted earnings of $1.93 per share, up 6% year-over-year and above the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.77.

title: State Street (STT) Stock Gains as Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: State Street (STT) records a decline in revenues in the third quarter of 2023.

title: State Street Corporation (STT) Q3 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: State Street Corporation (STT) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.93 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.77 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.82 per share a year ago.

title: State Street Corporation Reports Third-Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) reported its third-quarter 2023 financial results today. The news release, presentation, and additional financial information can be accessed on State Street's Investor Relations website, http://investors.statestreet.com. A conference call to discuss the firm's financial results, outlook and related matters will be held at 11:00 a.m. ET today, Wednesday, October 18, 2023. The call will be open to the public. title: 4 Top Banks Stocks As Student Loan Payments Resume
text: After more than a three-year hiatus, those who are part of the more than $1.7 trillion in outstanding student loan debt now need to resume payments that were halted. While some financial institutions do not have much exposure to the student loan market, others have been active in providing loans.

title: State Street to Participate in BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--State Street Corporation (NYSE: STT) announced today that Vice Chairman & Chief Financial Officer, Eric Aboaf, will participate in the BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference in Boston on Friday, November 3, 2023, at 11:20 am ET. An audio webcast will be accessible on the home page of State Street's Investor Relations website, https://investors.statestreet.com/.
